body:
Nadia, thanks so much for your note — it means a lot coming from you, especially given how much your perspective has shaped the way I think about early-stage conviction. I've been heads-down on a few new deals, including one in grid-edge software that I think would be right up your alley, and I wanted to loop you in before we move to term sheet. The founder, [Marcus Chen](companies/verdant-grid), has a genuinely differentiated take on demand-response coordination that I haven't seen anyone else articulate as cleanly. Beyond that, I've also been reflecting on some of the feedback you shared last quarter about how [Halfway Capital](orgs/halfway-capital) could sharpen our LP storytelling around the climate thesis — I think we're finally at a place where the portfolio tells a coherent narrative, and I'd love your read on the draft deck when it's ready. Would you have time for a call in the next week or two? Even 30 minutes would be incredibly valuable.

Amara
